raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The dark brown box_1 sits on top of box_2 and all four lateral faces are unobstructed. Both arms can approach from the left and right sides without colliding with the tabletop or the underlying box_2. Sufficient clearance exists above and around the stack to allow a vertical lift once the grip is established.",
    "Postcondition": "Both end-effectors press laterally against opposite sides of box_1 and lift it vertically until it is clear of box_2, leaving box_2 on the table while box_1 is securely held in mid-air by the robot."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The dark brown box_1 sits on top of box_2 and all four lateral faces are unobstructed. Both arms can approach from the left and right sides without colliding with the tabletop or the underlying box_2. Sufficient clearance exists above and around the stack to allow a vertical lift once the grip is established.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both end-effectors press laterally against opposite sides of box_1 and lift it vertically until it is clear of box_2, leaving box_2 on the table while box_1 is securely held in mid-air by the robot.
